overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a ride on the NCART metro system. The player explores a crowded train car with diverse cyberpunk characters before viewing the Night City skyline from elevated tracks at dusk, transitioning from enclosed tunnels to open industrial districts.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk metro train interior with neon lighting

events.description: player character stands up from seated position, camera rising from floor level to standing height
turning to observe passengers on the right side of the train car while continuing to walk

agents.ego_description: walking through the crowded train car from one end to the other, observing the diverse passengers including monks and punk characters

notable_agents.action: woman in long brown dress standing and holding a support pole
group of three monks in orange robes sitting on yellow cushioned seats

entered.detail: cyberpunk metro car with teal and yellow color scheme and overhead lighting
holographic route information showing Memorial Park station
yellow cushioned bench seats along the sides
glowing red and blue commercial signs above the windows
yellow metal handrails for standing passengers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a map interface before transitioning to the interior of a crowded NCART train car. The player walks through the narrow space, passing diverse cyberpunk characters including monks in orange robes and a woman in a brown dress. The car features yellow seats, teal metal walls, and glowing neon advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: subway tunnel with concrete walls and neon lighting

events.description: camera turns to face the train window, shifting focus from interior to exterior tunnel view
train enters section with colorful pink and blue neon arch lighting illuminating the tunnel

agents.ego_description: looking out the train window at the passing concrete tunnel walls and station platforms

entered.detail: concrete subway tunnel walls with illuminated metro logo signs
station platform with yellow safety line passing by
colorful pink and blue illuminated tunnel arches creating a cyberpunk atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The view shifts to the train window as it departs from Memorial Park station, entering a concrete subway tunnel. The train passes through a section with vibrant pink and blue neon arches illuminating the tunnel walls, while other passengers remain visible in the periphery.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated metro track overlooking industrial district

events.description: train exits tunnel into open air, revealing the Night City skyline and industrial district at dusk
train rounds a curve, shifting the perspective of the industrial towers and elevated highways

agents.ego_description: gazing at the Night City skyline and industrial towers from the elevated train tracks as the sun sets

entered.detail: tall brutalist concrete tower with large white 06 numbering illuminated on the side
adjacent tower with 07 numbering and industrial piping
modern high-rise buildings with illuminated windows against the dusk sky
multi-level road interchange with glowing teal accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The train emerges from the tunnel into the open air, revealing a sweeping view of Night City's industrial district at dusk. Massive numbered concrete towers dominate the skyline, with the 06 and 07 towers prominently visible. The train travels on elevated tracks above glowing highways, with the orange and purple sky visible between the cyberpunk architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the claustrophobic interior of a crowded metro car into a sweeping aerial vista of a cyberpunk metropolis at dusk. It begins with a map interface before shifting into the narrow space of an NCART train, where the camera weaves past diverse passengers and neon advertisements amidst teal metal walls. As the train departs Memorial Park station, the view moves toward the window and enters a concrete subway tunnel illuminated by vibrant pink and blue neon arches. The scene then opens abruptly as the train emerges from the tunnel onto elevated tracks, revealing a vast industrial district dominated by massive numbered concrete towers. Finally, the perspective expands to show glowing highways and a purple-orange sky stretching across the architectural skyline of Night City.
